name: Traktor Pro
notes: Traktor benefits from dedicated banks for decks, FX units, and browser navigation.
Use bright color grouping per deck to reduce mistakes in dark booths.
Relative encoders are preferred for FX depth and browse interactions.
setup_steps: Create or update a Controller Manager mapping in Traktor.
Use the exported all-bank summary to bind each encoder and switch to deck or FX targets.
Store the exported bridge JSON with the Traktor TSI so the hardware and software mapping stay paired.
